description: Fragment of a document of sale in which Nahray b. Nissim, the well-known banker and communal lender (d. 1096), buys from his brother-in-law and the sons of the latter's late brother one-third of a house worth 150 dinars. The total value of the house was 450 dinars. (Information from Goitein, Mediterranean Society, III, p. 37; IV, pp. 19, 287)
tags: real estate, Nahray B. Nissim, bill of sale
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
